imweb_operational.freshness_note: fresh 기준. 그래도 외부 전송 전에는 최신성 재확인이 필요하다.

operational_window.timezone_note: operational order paidAt filter uses KST day boundaries converted to timestamptz. This avoids excluding KST orders that are still previous-day UTC.

compaction.reason: keep repo artifact reviewable; full tmp excluded from gptconfirm
